name: The Ember Bazaar
quest: "My charm's not the only thing that slips out of rhythm around here — the bazaar lanterns only stay lit if someone keeps the beat with me. Dance it with me, won't you?"

name: Sable's Moonlit Den
quest: "I chart my way home by moonlight caught in glass. Watch where it falls, then show me you can trace the same path back — my kind trusts our paws more than our eyes, but yours will have to do."

name: Wren's Wandering Archive
quest: "Three years cataloguing the Hollow and my notes still end up everywhere but in order. If you could help me sort these pages back where they belong before I lose my place again — quickly, if you can manage it!"

name: Mochi's Wobble Den
quest: "Mochi wobbly again. Jelly-light won't hold still without a bead to steady it. Mochi need... someone to catch it right in the middle. Please try?"
